action.text: if exists(select 1 from dmvt where ma_vt = @ma_vt) begin declare @unitCode varchar(32) select @unitCode = case when @$ma_dvcs = '' then @@unit else @$ma_dvcs end exec FastBusiness$Voucher$ImportPurchase$Item @unitCode, @ma_vt return end
if exists(select 1 from dmqddvt where dvt = @dvt and (ma_vt = @ma_vt or ma_vt = '*')) begin select he_so from dmqddvt where dvt = @dvt and (ma_vt = @ma_vt or ma_vt = '*') return end
if exists(select 1 from dmthue where ma_thue = @ma_thue) select thue_suat from dmthue where ma_thue = @ma_thue else select 0 return

query.text: select @@fieldExternal from @@prime$partition$current a left join dmvt b on a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt where @@whereClause order by @@orderByClause
